creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Upgrade to 1.3 directly instead:

diff -ruN xpi-delicious/Makefile xpi-delicious-1.3/Makefile
--- xpi-delicious/Makefile      Mon Jun  5 16:23:43 2006
+++ xpi-delicious-1.3/Makefile  Mon Dec 11 09:01:31 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      delicious
-PORTVERSION=   1.1
+PORTVERSION=   1.3
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_MOZDEV}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
diff -ruN xpi-delicious/distinfo xpi-delicious-1.3/distinfo
--- xpi-delicious/distinfo      Mon Jun  5 16:23:43 2006
+++ xpi-delicious-1.3/distinfo  Mon Dec 11 09:01:42 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (xpi/delicious-1.1.xpi) = f92f3ceea4811ec4f23af306940bc1b8
-SHA256 (xpi/delicious-1.1.xpi) =
5e89c8d66b02a19adc77c7fbc624c43fb6c34446d57f90093d38769a37eb18ac
-SIZE (xpi/delicious-1.1.xpi) = 60699
+MD5 (xpi/delicious-1.3.xpi) = d1164d870ad4c8a6d1093d7f93a9a7d7
+SHA256 (xpi/delicious-1.3.xpi) =
ff53c4eb47c41af5f167cf108bc7e6741fa96e15a31e21f14382a46ff1389c97
+SIZE (xpi/delicious-1.3.xpi) = 60825
